proven.claim: PROVEN: Falsy Default Trap at classify
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: falsy-default
; LINE: 72
; PROVEN: Falsy Default Trap at classify
(declare-const output_value Int)
(declare-const result Int)
; Guard: ?? used instead of || (nullish coalescing preserves falsy values)
(assert (= result output_value))
; Can result differ from input?
(assert (not (= result output_value)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: falsy values preserved
